Plot a module-score correlation heatmap (WGCNA-style)

Source: R/visualization.R
plot_module_score_heatmap.Rd

Plot a dendrogram-ordered module-score correlation heatmap, analogous to module eigengene network heatmaps commonly used in WGCNA tutorials.

Usage

plot_module_score_heatmap(
  score_df,
  layer = "CGM",
  top_n = 15,
  corr_method = c("spearman", "pearson")
)

Arguments

score_df

Data frame or matrix (samples x modules) of module scores.

layer

Layer label used in the title.

top_n

Maximum number of modules (highest variance) to include.

corr_method

Correlation method.

Value

Invisibly returns the plotted correlation matrix.
